blended.narrative: Edelweiss Valley is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 3.2 inches of wet, heavy snow expected. Snow levels around 6,373 ft. Looking ahead, 20 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Wednesday: 10" of heavy snow, highs of 35°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Saturday: 2.1" of snow, highs of 29°F. Expect variable conditions.
Sunday: 3.3" of snow, highs of 24°F. Expect powder.
